# disableStreams()

**Instance Method**

Disables streams for the pipe.

## Declaration

```swift
func disableStreams() throws
```

## Discussion

This method changes the operational mode of the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/kernel/iousbhostpipe] to disable streaming endpoint transfers. Before calling this method, set all stream contexts as nonactive on the device through an out-of-band (class-defined) mechanism, in accordance with USB 3.2, 8.12.1.4. This is necessary, as the method synchronously aborts any outstanding calls on existing [doc://com.apple.iousbhost/documentation/IOUSBHost/IOUSBHostStream] objects.

## Managing Streams

- **enableStreams()**: Enables streams for the pipe.
- **copyStream(withStreamID:)**: Returns the stream for a stream ID.
